name: pixel-perfect-ui-skill
description: Cross-IDE pixel-perfect screenshot-to-code reconstruction and visual patching skill

scripts.demo:visual-plan: node scripts/plan-visual-reconstruction.js --input "full-page landing screenshot with header hero feature cards testimonials faq footer and repeated buttons" --format markdown
scripts.demo:visual-patch: node scripts/plan-visual-patch.js --input "In the screenshot, add a green outlined button to the right of the second hero CTA labeled '了解更多'"
scripts.demo:visual-patch:multi: node scripts/plan-visual-patch.js --input "In the screenshot, add a green outlined button to the right of the second hero CTA labeled '了解更多', and change the second left sidebar item to an active green style under '最近项目'"
scripts.verify:all: npm run verify:visual-plan-contract && npm run verify:visual-patch-contract && npm run verify:public-example && npm run verify:auto-sample && npm run verify:extract-measurements && npm run verify:fidelity && npm run verify:box-layout && npm run verify:exact-scaffold && npm run verify:install
scripts.verify:all:browser: npm run verify:all && npm run verify:capture
